breakdown: This PR adds XP progress tracking (current_xp/next_level_xp) to the rewards box visibility check in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui(). The changes include a new condition to show content when both XP values are positive, plus test renaming and docstring updates. Architectural improvement: refactoring _ensure_session_header_resources to session_header_utils module. Test coverage is solid with multiple test cases for fallback scenarios.
key_changes: Add XP progress tracking visibility check: or (current_xp > 0 and next_level_xp > 0) in has_visible_content
Update normalize_rewards_box_for_ui docstring to document new XP tracking visibility logic
Rename ensure_level_up_rewards_pending to _check_and_set_level_up_pending in test comments
Multiple test functions renamed from parametrized to standalone fixtures with descriptive names
